title: International Students Office - About Our Office
content:
International Students Office - About Our Office

International Students Department of Istanbul Esenyurt University has been launched into activity in the 2019-2020 academic year in order to comply with the aims of the Presidency of Turkey in regards to international student recruitment for 2023, raising the number of the students up to 350.000. Istanbul Esenyurt UniversityInternational Students Department has managed to do the registration of more than 500 students from more than 30 countries altogether in its first year and therefore working effectively for achieving the aims of the presidency Istanbul is one of the most cosmopolitan cities in the world and the preferred place of study for many international students and we aim for making our university an international, and student-centered university, chosen by most of them. Our Univerity is offering studies in 4 Faculties, 2 Vocational Schools, 2 Schools and Graduate Schools in a wide range from health sciences to engineering in almost 70 courses and three campuses and we grow more every day through our internationalization policies. For students who do not have the necessary level of language proficiency and need Language Preparation Year, we offer Turkish and English studies in our Centers. For more information about our offers in excellent studies, scholarships, and other prospects, please visit our website.

This content was updated on 23/09/2024.
